articles.title: Flight passengers are warned things could get worse amid DHS shutdown, delays and callouts
articles.summary: The U.K. is warning travelers of potential U.S. airport delays amid the ongoing shutdown. TSA callout rates hit record 55% at some airports as unpaid officers quit or call out.

articles.title: Tuberville defends post likening Mamdani to 9/11 attacks: 'I just go by his rhetoric'
articles.summary: Sen. Tommy Tuberville, R-Ala., defended his controversial social media post comparing New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, who is Muslim, to the 9/11 terror attacks.

articles.title: Pro-life leader criticizes 'insane' UK bill that would decriminalize certain abortions up until birth
articles.summary: Shawn Carney, CEO of 40 Days for Life, expressed concern over a U.K. bill aimed at shielding women from criminal liability for abortions up until birth, describing it as "insane."

articles.title: FBI rescues missing teen from Florida hotel after month-long hunt for accused kidnapper
articles.summary: FBI rescues missing 16-year-old Ohio girl after month-long search, arresting Tennessee suspect accused of kidnapping in coordinated multi-state operation.

articles.title: Venezuela hero Eugenio Suarez taps faith after shocking Team USA: 'All the glory is for the Lord Jesus'
articles.summary: Venezuela star Eugenio Suarez, who hit the game-winning double to beat Team USA in the World Baseball Classic final, thanked God and shared his faith after winning.

articles.title: Dem congressional candidate Bobby Pulido depicts lewd behavior in controversial music video for his song

articles.title: AIPAC-backed Chicago Democrat loses primary despite outside spending blitz
articles.summary: Chicago treasurer Melissa Conyears-Ervin lost the Democratic primary for a House seat after AIPAC spent over $4 million in her favor.

articles.title: Venezuela shocks Team USA to win World Baseball Classic for first time
articles.summary: Eugenio Suarez's game-winning RBI double cemented Venezuela as World Baseball Classic champions, shocking Team USA in a thriller final on Tuesday night in Miami.

articles.title: Pritzker scores big: Stratton wins Illinois Senate primary in test of governor’s clout
articles.summary: Illinois Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton, backed by Gov. JB Pritzker, wins Democratic Senate primary, moving closer to becoming the fifth Black woman elected to U.S. Senate in history.

articles.title: Establishment Democrats fend off far-left influencer in primary to succeed Rep Jan Schakowsky
articles.summary: Fifteen Democrats were vying in a primary to replace longtime Illinois Rep. Jan Schakowsky.

articles.title: Former congresswoman wins primary to take back former suburban Chicago seat
articles.summary: Former Rep. Melissa Bean won the Democratic primary in Illinois’ 8th District, staging a comeback more than a decade after losing her suburban Chicago seat.

articles.title: Democrat Patty García gains party’s nomination after controversial last-minute dropout by incumbent
articles.summary: Democrat Patty García glided to her party’s nomination for Illinois Congressional District 4 after a controversial last-minute dropout by incumbent Rep. Jesús “Chuy" García.

articles.title: Illinois Republicans select Don Tracy in primary elections for Sen. Durbin's seat

articles.title: As 2028 buzz builds, Pritzker draws Republican challenger in showdown for Illinois governor
articles.summary: Gov. JB Pritzker, who aims to make history as the first Democrat to win three terms as Illinois governor, learns which Republican he'll face off against in this autumn's election

articles.title: Pittsburgh police officers accused of ignoring ICE agents’ struggle with suspect
articles.summary: Pittsburgh police were allegedly told to stand down as ICE agents struggled with a suspect during a detention attempt. The chief has launched an investigation into the claims.

articles.summary: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro unleashes scathing criticism of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's Iran war leadership, calling him incompetent and offensive.

articles.title: Biden-appointed judge twice shut down by SCOTUS faces 'activist' fire after latest Trump policy block

articles.title: Mamdani references Palestinian 'genocide' during St Patrick's Day event

articles.summary: Gulf states maintain restraint despite reported Iranian attacks on Saudi Arabia, UAE, Bahrain, Qatar and Kuwait, prioritizing regional stability.
